documentation.description:
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  Vector Graphics - PDF                                                        --
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  The PDF_Bar_Code function produces a PDF (Portable Document Format) snippet  --
  to be included into a PDF document. For instance, you can use                --
  Insert_Graphics_PDF_Code of package PDF_Out (project Ada PDF Writer,         --
  http://apdf.sf.net/ ) for such an inclusion.                                 --
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------

subprograms.name: PBM_Bar_Code

parameters.name: scale_x
parameters.description: Scaling factors for the bitmap rendering

parameters.name: scale_y
parameters.description: Scaling factors for the bitmap rendering

subprograms.name: PDF_Bar_Code

parameters.name: bounding
parameters.description: Box in the PDF page, containing the bar code

subprograms.name: PNG_Bar_Code

parameters.name: scale_x
parameters.description: Scaling factors for the bitmap rendering

parameters.name: scale_y
parameters.description: Scaling factors for the bitmap rendering

subprograms.name: SVG_Bar_Code

parameters.name: bounding
parameters.description: Box in the SVG plane, containing the bar code

parameters.name: unit
parameters.description: Length unit, for instance "mm" for millimeter
